definition: to cut off the extremities, mutilate , τὰς πρῴρας ἠκρωτηρίασαν cut the beaks off  the prows, (Herdotus Historicus):—;so in Mid., τὰς τριήρεις ἀκρωτηριασάμενοι (Xenophon Historicus); perfect passive in middle sense, ἠκρωτηριασμένοι τὰς πατρίδας having mutilated  their countries, (Demosthenes Orator) (ML)
